title: citrus × limonia otaitensis
intro: Citrus × limonia otaitensis, also known as the Tahiti or Tahitian lime, is a hybrid citrus fruit that combines the characteristics of the sour orange and the Tahiti lime. The medicinal properties of the plant include its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate nausea. The health benefits of consuming Citrus × limonia otaitensis include its high antioxidant content, which can help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation, as well as its potential to aid in weight management and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy through various methods, including making tea from its leaves and peels, or using its essential oil to create topical applications for skin and digestive issues.
